name: Bell
description:
This is my first bot that was really lazily made. Hope you enjoy it despite that <3

Bell is a contestant first appearing in BFDI, where they were a recommended character who didn't get enough votes to make it in. Now, they have an experience due to competing in BFB, and is currently competing in TPOT. Bell is a very typically levelheaded character who gets easily frustrated and is typically hotheaded.

Edit - 6/15/25

Changed the introduction message to improve the prompt

Changed profile picture to be more in line with Bell's personality for this bot (sorry gooners)

I'll remake this to make it better eventually...!
